title: Staff Data Scientist, GenAI Applications, Global Business Consulting - Singapore
topic_label: ai capabilities, ai, ai solutions
description: Product area Google Play offers music, movies, books, apps and games for devices, powered by the cloud. It syncs across devices and on the web. As part of the Android and Mobile team, Googlers working on Google Play do everything from engineering our backend systems, to shaping product strategy, to forming great content partnerships. They make it possible for people to do things like buy an ebook or song on their Android phone, then have it instantly available on their laptop. The Google Play team enhances the Android ecosystem by giving developers and partners a premium store where they can reach millions of users. Job description Google's leadership team hand-picks thorny business challenges, and members of BizOps work in small teams to find solutions. As part of this team you fully immerse yourself in data collection, draw insight from analysis, and then zoom out to develop compelling, synthesized recommendations. Taking strategy one step further, you also persuasively communicate your recommendations to senior-level executives, roll-up your sleeves to help drive implementation and check back-in to see the impact of your recommendations. Additional job description We are seeking an experienced Data Scientist with a background and passion for Generative AI to lead the research, development, and evaluation of our Generative AI solutions. This full-stack solution will be built directly upon critical data assets and integrated into core business consultation workflows. This role offers a unique opportunity to work closely with mobile games and apps developers, translating data into AI-driven products that directly enable the growth of their businesses. Qualifications Job responsibilities Design and implement data science pipelines, utilizing techniques such as Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and Fine-tuning, to build advanced Generative AI solutions. Develop algorithms and predictive models to solve business problems. Develop and refine Large Language Model (LLM) based agents and sophisticated workflows, specifically focusing on advanced prompt engineering (e.g., Multi-hop Chain of Thought Prompting (MCP)), configuring RAG systems (e.g., chunking, embeddings, metadata filters, and vector databases). Serve as a subject matter expert, partnering with consultants and business stakeholders to translate ambiguous business issues into meaningful data science questions, drive data-driven decision-making, and mentor junior team members. Design and implement efficient data pipelines for data collection, cleaning, and pre-processing to ensure the quality of datasets is tailored for LLM training/serving. Minimum qualifications Master's degree in a quantitative discipline such as Statistics, Engineering, Sciences, or equivalent practical experience. 7 years of experience using analytics to solve product or business problems, coding (e.g., Python, R, SQL), querying databases or statistical analysis. Preferred qualifications Experience in Generative AI evaluation methodologies and metrics (e.g., LLM-as-a-judge, safety, quality, and bias detection). Experience applying Generative AI technologies to enterprise-scale products and solutions, particularly within a quantitative domain. Understanding of MLOps/LLMOps practices for productionizing AI agents and models. Proficiency with cloud-native platforms (e.g., Google Cloud/GCP). Ability to break down ambiguous problems and propose impactful solutions through data modeling and system design. Excellent attention to detail and effective verbal/written communication skills, including the ability to communicate technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.

title: SNR RF Optimization Engineer
topic_label: embedded systems, embedded software development, engineer
description:
We are appointing an RF Optimization
Engineer (15+ years’ experience) to lead radio network performance improvement activities in Singapore. This role is responsible for planning and executing benchmarking (drive testing and analysis), performing cluster-level RF/RAN optimization, and delivering validated recommendations to improve key network KPIs (Accessibility, Retainability, Mobility, Coverage/Quality, and Throughput) in 4G LTE and 5G NR networks. Key Responsibilities 1) Project Planning & Delivery
Management Establish project workplan, milestones, reporting cadence, and deliverable structure aligned to customer requirements. Coordinate field execution readiness (resources, tooling, drive routes, scheduling, permissions, and safety/compliance). Maintain issue/risk tracking, prioritization, and escalation to ensure timely delivery and stable execution. 2) Network Benchmarking (Drive Test
Planning & Execution) Define benchmarking methodology including test objectives, KPIs, test scripts, UE configuration, logging settings, and route  selection to ensure repeatable measurements. Lead and oversee drive test execution for benchmarking and cluster validation (outdoor/indoor where applicable). Ensure data integrity through log checks, calibration, synchronization, and quality assurance of collected measurements. Produce benchmark summaries highlighting performance gaps, root causes, and prioritized improvement opportunities. 3) RF/RAN Performance Analysis &
Troubleshooting Analyze drive-test logs and performance counters to identify RF coverage/quality issues and mobility/throughput bottlenecks. Perform detailed root-cause analysis for issues such as drops, setup failures, handover failures, reselection problems, interference symptoms, and low throughput areas using L3 signaling and KPI correlation. Identify high-impact cells/clusters, quantify impact, and recommend corrective actions. 4) Cluster-Level Optimization &
Validation Establish baseline performance and define optimization targets
within the cluster scope. Propose RF/RAN parameter tuning and feature optimization
actions to improve KPI performance (e.g., mobility thresholds,
reselection/handover criteria, load distribution, coverage-quality
trade-offs, CA/MIMO utilization, and capacity-related tuning). Validate changes through post-optimization drive tests and KPI
tracking to confirm improvements and stability. Document outcomes with evidence-based reporting and
recommendations for further improvement. 5) KPI Tracking, Reporting &
Customer Communication Collect and analyze network KPIs and trends (daily/weekly),
correlate OSS data with field measurements, and highlight regressions or improvement opportunities. Prepare customer-ready deliverables including interim reports, final reports, KPI dashboards/summaries, and validation evidence (pre/post comparison). Lead technical discussions and review sessions with stakeholders, translating technical findings into clear actions and expected impact. Tools & Technologies (Typical) Drive test and post-processing tools (e.g., Accuver / TEMS / XCAL / Actix or equivalent) OSS/PM KPI extraction and analysis tools (Excel/Power BI or equivalent reporting) LTE/NR protocol and L3 analysis for mobility and session performance (RRC/NAS interpretation) RF and performance domains: RSRP/RSRQ/SINR/CQI, mobility events, throughput KPIs, capacity indicators, and parameter/feature tuning concepts Required Qualifications 10+ years of experience in RF/RAN optimization, benchmarking,
and performance engineering for LTE and 5G NR networks. Strong capability in drive test design/execution and post-processing/log analysis. Demonstrated expertise in KPI-based troubleshooting and
root-cause analysis across accessibility, retainability, mobility,
coverage/quality, and throughput. Proven ability to produce customer-facing technical reports and
lead optimization review discussions with cross-functional teams.

description: Job Description (Class 3/4 Driver): Providing Delivery Services: Responsible for transporting goods from the warehouse or distribution center to designated delivery locations safely and efficiently. Ensure timely delivery based on the assigned schedule. Delivery of Goods to Outlets, Commercial, Residential, and Industrial Areas (Clustered): Deliver products to various locations, including retail stores, food establishments, offices, factories, and residential areas. Handle multiple deliveries within designated zones efficiently (clustered delivery). Pick and Pack of Goods onto Pallets: Assist in preparing and organizing goods for delivery. Ensure that items are correctly packed, labeled, and securely placed on pallets for safe transportation. Loading and Unloading: Load and unload goods from the vehicle, ensuring proper handling to prevent damage. Use manual handling equipment (such as pallet jacks, electric pallet trucks, or trolleys) when necessary. Other Ad Hoc Duties as Assigned: Perform additional tasks assigned by supervisors or managers, such as assisting in warehouse operations, route planning, or vehicle-related duties. Job Responsibilities (Class 3/4 Driver): Ensure Safe Handling of Goods: Follow best practices when handling fragile, perishable, or hazardous items. Use protective equipment like gloves or harnesses when required. Double-check load security before transportation. Practice Safe Driving: Adhere to defensive driving techniques to minimize risks on the road. Maintain appropriate speed limits and adapt to different road conditions. Avoid distractions such as mobile phone usage while driving. Observe Safe Work Procedures while Delivering Goods to Customers: Follow company safety guidelines and standard operating procedures (SOPs) to prevent workplace accidents. Be mindful of lifting techniques to avoid injuries. Maintain awareness of surroundings while maneuvering the vehicle, especially in tight spaces or crowded areas. Comply with Traffic Rules and Regulations: Abide by all traffic laws, including speed limits, parking rules, and load restrictions. Ensure compliance with LTA (Land Transport Authority) and NEA (National Environment Agency) regulations where applicable. Maintain proper documentation such as delivery orders, invoices, and vehicle inspection reports. Familiarity with Singapore Roads is an Added Advantage: Knowledge of major expressways (PIE, CTE, AYE, etc.) and common delivery routes. Ability to navigate efficiently using GPS or maps while considering road restrictions. Awareness of alternative routes to avoid traffic congestion and ensure on-time delivery. Ensure Vehicle is Taken Care of in Terms of Cleanliness, Maintenance, and Condition: Conduct daily vehicle checks before and after trips (brakes, lights, fuel, tires, etc.). Report any malfunctions or damages to the fleet maintenance team. Keep the vehicle clean, both inside and outside, to maintain professionalism and hygiene standards.

title: DevSecOps Engineer

description: Job Purpose The team designs, delivers, and operates secure, reliable, and scalable digital platforms to supportpolicy, operations, and service delivery across Singapore’s social service sector. The DevSecOps Engineer plays a key role in embedding security, automation, and operational best practices across the application lifecycle. You will work closely with application engineers, security teams, and cross-functional stakeholders to design, implement, and maintain secure cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and operational controls, ensuring systems meet government security and compliance requirements. Key Responsibilities and Activities: • Design, implement, and maintain CI/CD pipelines to support secure and reliable application delivery • Embed security controls and best practices across the software development lifecycle • Support deployment and operations of applications on cloud platforms • Implement and manage infrastructure as code for cloud resources and environments • Configure and maintain identity, access controls, logging, and monitoring in line with security requirements • Perform security hardening, vulnerability remediation, and operational improvements • Collaborate with developers and security teams to ensure secure-by-design application architecture • Create and maintain technical documentation, runbooks, and operational procedures Job Requirements Qualification & Experience • Relevant education qualification in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or related technical fields• 3–5 years of experience in DevOps, DevSecOps, site reliability engineering, or cloud operations • Cloud or security-related certifications (optional)Skills • Experience in designing and maintaining CI/CD pipelines • Hands-on experience with cloud platforms (e.g. AWS) and cloud-native services • Familiarity with Infrastructure as Code tools and practices (e.g. Terraform, AWS Cloud Formation) • Understanding of application and infrastructure security, including access controls and logging• Experience with monitoring, alerting, and operational support • Exposure to containerization and orchestration technologies• Experience with version control systems (e.g. Git) and automation workflow Shortlisted candidate will be reached out .

title: CAD/CAM Engineer

description: Job Description & Requirements Cyrus Technology started in 2005 with the vision to approach polymeric tooling design in unconventional methods and providing manufacturing solutions to exacting specifications for ultra-precision and complex moulding. We pride ourselves as a valued partner to our clients, offering expertise at every stage of the product design to manufacturing, to transform market opportunity ideas to a marketable product.  With the progress we achieved so far, we aim to continue to push boundaries and overcome constraints to be a leader in the industry. Your key responsibilities are as follows: To develop, document and support the build of high precision plastic injection tooling and molded parts for manufacturing. Support Program team during upfront new project quotation stage by providing accurate upfront tooling/product DFM that matches the right quality requirements. To meet customer for DFM and mold concept review to ensure customer’s technical requirements and concerns are addressed. Support Tooling Department by conducting internal tooling design and DFM reviews before tool launch. Support Production in areas like molding process optimization, implement manufacturing fixtures and automation for reliability and efficiency improvements. Support Quality Team in the design and fabrication of test/measurement fixtures. To coordinate mold trials, tooling and molded part troubleshooting and carry out necessary engineering changes to ensure parts can be produced smoothly with the required quality. Your areas of knowledge and expertise that matter most for this role: Excellent technical analytical ability with strong interest for problem solving. Self-motivated team player with good interpersonal and communication skills. Past working experience or knowledge of Precision Tooling Design/Fabrication, Micro Plastic Injection Molding Process or Manufacturing Process Engineering related field preferred. 3D CAD software skill for Siemens UG NX or PTC Creo 4.0 and above

description: Staff Data Platform Engineer, Singapore Airwallex is the leading financial technology platform for modern businesses growing beyond borders. With one of the world’s most powerful payments and banking infrastructures, our technology empowers businesses of all sizes to accept payments, move money globally, and simplify their financial operations, all in one single platform. Established in 2015 in Melbourne, we aim to connect entrepreneurs, business builders, makers, and creators with opportunities in every corner of the world. Today, Airwallex has a global footprint across Asia-Pacific, Europe, and North America. The Role: As a leader level data expert, you will oversee the strategy, architecture, development, and operation of Airwallex's data and AI platforms. You will play a pivotal role in influencing data-driven and AI-powered decision-making processes. A key aspect of your role will also include building a high-performing team that excels in a fast-paced environment. Your leadership will be critical in mentoring the team, promoting a culture of innovation, and driving technical excellence. Responsibilities： Spearheaded the identification and resolution of Airwallex-wide challenges using cutting-edge data platform solutions. Provide visionary technical direction, fostering a community within Airwallex's data realm, and actively leading in solving complex problems hands-on. Advocate for best practices across the data platform, instilling a culture of craftsmanship and innovation. Mentor the data platform team, nurturing both technical and professional development. Minimum Requirements: A minimum of 8 years of experience in Data Platform or an equivalent combination of work and academic exposure in a quantitative field. Proven experience leading company-wide initiatives across multiple teams or influencing tech roadmap planning. Effective collaboration with diverse teams and stakeholders to drive tangible business outcomes. Demonstrated ability to balance execution and velocity with in-depth research, statistical understanding, and scalable design. Track record of mentoring and investing in the development of scientists, engineers, and peers. Experience providing technical leadership on significant projects, covering ETL frameworks, metrics stores, infrastructure management, and data security. Proficiency in building, deploying, and maintaining reliable multi-geographical data pipelines at scale. Familiarity with workflow or orchestration frameworks such as Airflow, DBT, etc. Preferred Qualifications: Hands-on design experience in crafting data processing patterns for a modern Lakehouse architecture. Contribute to the design and development of standard framework modules, high-performance services, and client libraries for big data using tools like GCP, Databricks, BigQuery, DataProc, Kafka, Kubernetes, Spark, DataFlow, Google Cloud Storage, and Airflow. Excellent written and verbal communication skills tailored for diverse audiences (leadership, users, company-wide). Ability to rapidly evaluate various technologies and conduct proof of concepts to drive architecture design. Experience thriving in a complex environment.

Also, Control of the Quality of main TPI/contractor/vendor's inspection personnel’s work activities on a daily basis. • Acting as focal point for the resolution of shop / site related Quality Control issues in consultation with Sr. Quality Engineer and QHSE Head. • Control and follow-up of Contractor/Vendor’s Technical deviations, material substitutions, changes to inspection and test requirements at shop/ sites/ installations. • Control and follow-up of Non-conformance Reports and ensure the implementation of the Corrective Action Requested and the preventive action proposed. • Monitoring and report Contractor’s quality statistics and KPI by monitoring welding repair rate, NDE performance, status of NCR’s, Audit findings, and site Surveillance findings. • Ensure that the Contractor / Vendor prepare, manages proper inspection & test records, and compiles test packs & dossiers/MRB for submission Qualification: • Master's or higher educational qualification in Mechanical or Metallurgical Engineering from recognized Engineering faculty. • A valid CSWIP 3.2.1 or AWS Sr. welding Inspection Certificate (SCWI) and at least five year post-certification experiences’ • B Gas Grade 2, or NACE level II Coating inspector qualified is preferable. • NDT level II in RT, UT, PT& MT/ NDT qualifications against ASNT or ISO requirements. • Certified QMS Lead Auditor in accordance with ISO 9001:2015 and having at least five years experience in auditing. • A good knowledge of international codes/standards EN, ISO, API, ASME and ASTM. • Good leadership skills and good communication skills. • Ability to work on projects in a complex and multicultural environment. • Be skilled in using computer programs, MS Office, database management, spreadsheets, and e-mail communications. Experience: • A minimum of fifteen (15) years experiences as QA/QC coordinator / QA/QC Lead, leading QC multidiscipline inspectors’ team, for inspection & testing activities for a major oil and gas projects/ offshore process platforms / jackets/subsea pipeline, including all phases of manufacturing, fabrication, construction, and offshore installation / laying. • A minimum 5-year offshore project experience. • Experience in an international oil company/operator company/EPIC contractor • Middle East project experience is an advantage. • Experience in managing contractor, Sub contractor, Vendor, TPI’s in major projects. Experience in multi discipline activities related to offshore projects such as fabrication/installation of structure and piping, NDT Material inspection, Mechanical equipment installation, Sour services, Cladded Piping and Corrosion Resistance Alloy “CRA” pipeline, welding, NDT, repair works, dimensional control, painting, coating, internal lining, Monel sheathing etc.

title: DevOps & QA Automation Engineer
topic_label: cloud engineer, devops engineer, cloud engineering
description: Company Overview Blue Silo is a leading technology company specializing in mission-critical, enterprise-grade software solutions for defense, government, and industrial sectors. We build, deploy, and maintain robust, secure, and scalable systems. To ensure excellence across the entire lifecycle of our products, we seek a versatile engineer. This role combines the disciplines of DevOps and Quality Assurance (QA) Automation to ensure our deployed systems are not only operationally stable but also functionally impeccable, from the infrastructure layer to the user interface. Job Description You will be a pivotal force in our engineering team, responsible for the health of our infrastructure and the quality of our software. You will architect reliable deployment pipelines, maintain production and testing environments, and build automated test suites. Your work directly bridges development, QA, and operations, ensuring rapid, safe, and high-quality delivery of our mission-critical applications. Key Responsibilities 1. Infrastructure, DevOps & O&M Manage and monitor production systems, ensuring high availability and performance (Linux/Windows, Zabbix). Provision, secure, and maintain cloud infrastructure (AWS, Azure, GCP) using Infrastructure as Code (Terraform). Build, maintain, and optimize CI/CD pipelines (Bitbucket Pipelines) for automated deployments. Administer virtualization platforms, containers (Docker), and implement backup/recovery solutions. 2. Quality Assurance & Test Automation Design, develop, and maintain end-to-end and API automated test suites using Cypress for our React/Node.js stack. Integrate automated tests into the CI/CD pipeline to act as quality gates for every release. Perform backend/API testing to validate business logic, data integrity, and service integrations. Champion quality best practices, collaborate on test strategy, and document test cases. 3. Cross-Functional & Security Implement and validate security controls and configurations across infrastructure and applications. Create and maintain comprehensive technical documentation for systems, procedures, and tests. Participate in on-call rotations, incident response, and post-mortem reviews. Collaborate closely with development and product teams in an Agile environment. Required Qualifications Proven experience (4+ years) in a combined or adjacent DevOps/SRE and QA Automation role. DevOps Proficiency: Hands-on experience with cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP), IaC (Terraform), CI/CD tools, and system administration. QA Automation Expertise: Strong proficiency with Cypress for testing modern web applications. Solid programming in JavaScript/TypeScript. Full-Stack Understanding: Experience with React frontends and Node.js backends/APIs. Security & Process Mindset: Understanding of security best practices and a meticulous approach to documentation and incident management. Preferred Qualifications Experience with performance testing tools (k6, JMeter) and security testing concepts. Knowledge of container orchestration (Kubernetes) and configuration management (Ansible). Experience in regulated industries (defense, government) with high compliance standards. Relevant professional certifications. What We Offer A central role in defining technical excellence for high-stakes projects. The challenge of mastering and integrating two critical engineering disciplines. Collaboration with a talented full-stack development team. Competitive compensation and benefits package. How to Apply Please send your resume and a cover letter explaining your unique blend of DevOps and QA Automation experience to hr@bluesilo.studio. Include "DevOps & QA Automation Engineer Application" in the subject line.

title: Process Engineer (Semiconductor Equipment / Skills in Data Analysis & Equipment Design)
topic_label: engineering manufacturing, manufacturing processes, manufacturing process
description:
Responsibilities Design and implement machine processes to improve machine efficiency, reliability, and product quality. Conduct process corner studies to optimize key parameters and ensure machines operate within defined
specifications. Analyze machine performance data to identify trends, improve accuracy, and resolve process-related issues. Develop and validate process control strategies to maintain consistent equipment performance and meet customer specifications. Lead equipment qualification activities (FAT / SAT). Define and document machine technical requirements, including detailed specifications, SOPs, and risk assessments (PFMEA). Perform root cause analysis on equipment and process issues, implementing corrective and preventive actions using methodologies such as 8D and DMAIC. Collaborate with design engineering teams to ensure manufacturability and maintainability of new equipment. Support new product development by scaling prototypes for production readiness. Train manufacturing and customer service personnel on process standards, troubleshooting, and best practices. Evaluate new customer materials and components for compatibility with existing equipment and processes. Provide technical support for customer escalations, including in-house and on-site troubleshooting. Ensure machine compliance with regulatory requirements such as JDEC/EIA standards throughout product
development and implementation. Apply statistical process control (SPC) and Six Sigma methodologies to reduce variation and improve machine process capability. Drive continuous improvement projects to enhance equipment performance and reduce operational costs. Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in engineering or related discipline. Over 3 years of experience in process or application engineering within semiconductor equipment manufacturing/OEM environment. Strong data analysis skills and using tools such as MS Excel, JMP, or Minitab and methodologies (SPC, Six Sigma, Lean) is required. Strong understanding of semiconductor equipment design, process integration, and manufacturing principles. Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to work cross-functionally with engineering, manufacturing, and

title: Research Associate (NIE-OfR)
topic_label: singapore management university, singapore management, management university
description: The National Institute of Education invites suitable applications for the position of Research Associate on a 15-month contract at the Office for Research . Project Title: Perspectives on Research Impact through Stakeholder Mapping (PRISM) Project Introduction: There has been an increasingly urgent call internationally for research to have an impact on the broader society and to better showcase and communicate that impact and value. Within education, although the need for evidence-based practice in policy and practice is recognised (e.g., Lingard, 2013), much of it remains fragmented and tends to be “invisible” due to it being embedded into educational policies, technologies, and services, often without acknowledgement (Cain & Allan, 2017). To optimise impact, the mobilisation of research knowledge across multiple stakeholders is required for the application of findings in real-world contexts (Bayley et al., 2018; Cooper, 2017; Social Sciences and Humanities Research Council, 2020). This mixed-methods study seeks to examine Singapore stakeholders’ perspectives of what counts as education research impact. The first phase of the study will make use of documentary analysis and a case study approach for in-depth understanding of the stakeholders’ perspectives of impact. A follow-up survey to the larger educational community in Phase 2 will develop greater understanding of the diverse perspectives from varied stakeholders and reveal underlying, interconnected insights and trends on education research impact. Requirements: Masters in Education, Psychology, Sociology or other related fields Experience in writing literature reviews, data collection and analysis Interest and experience in knowledge mobilisation and research translation Strong communication skills, including experience in peer-review publications and research communications Responsibilities: Coordinate research administration, including IRB applications Conduct literature review, data collection and analysis Assist with writing and presentations Managing research communications Supporting research team in all other research-related matters as assigned by Principal Investigator Application Applicants (external and internal) will apply via Workday. We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified. Workday Job Requisition ID: R00023233 (https://ntu.wd3.myworkdayjobs.com/Careers/job/NTU-Main-Campus-Singapore/Research-Associate--Office-for-Research---NIE-_R00023233) Closing Date Closing date for advertisements will be set to 14 calendar days from date of posting.

What you’ll need. 5+ years of experience in data science, with a strong record of delivering impactful projects from data exploration through to production deployment. Deep proficiency in Python and SQL, with strong software engineering fundamentals (clean, modular, well-documented code, testing, and version control with Git). Proven experience designing and building scalable data workflows or data-driven products, including architecting pipelines, modular components, and reusable frameworks. Experience applying large language models or advanced NLP techniques (e.g. embeddings, semantic parsing, topic modelling, text classification); familiarity with processing Asian languages is a plus. Strong grasp of statistical methods and core machine learning algorithms, with practical experience using libraries such as scikit-learn, statsmodels, and the ability to select appropriate models based on data characteristics and problem context. Comfortable working with large, messy, and unstructured datasets, particularly text and image-based data. Ability to translate complex technical insights into clear, actionable recommendations for non-technical stakeholders, and collaborate closely with strategists to drive business outcomes. A collaborative mindset, with openness to feedback and diverse perspectives. Bonus points if you have the following. Experience leading or mentoring junior data scientists, including setting technical direction and supporting professional growth. Experience building and maintaining production-grade data pipelines (e.g. Airflow, Dagster) or integrating data from APIs, web scraping, or third-party providers. Familiarity with cloud environments such as Google Cloud or AWS, and deploying data science workflows at scale Why Synthesis? Synthesis is known for delivering exceptional data models and products that uncover the stories of the people they represent and inspire our partners to act with confidence. Partnering with the world’s most successful brands in fashion, beauty, content, and travel, we’re building specialised solutions to solve problems of planning for the future. Rooted in culture, tested in data science, we spot and anticipate changes and connections in culture to inspire action and help brands grow with a new wave of audiences. After three years of iterative development and refinement, we are preparing to launch a series of products over the next 5 years. We will be at the forefront of a shift towards leveraging open data to develop rich, honest, human insight. In an industry that has, for too long, relied on a ‘question-response’ approach to understanding changes in behaviour, we prioritise layering behavioural, performative, search, and sales data to highlight discrepancies between what people say they do and what they actually do. We see a $40 billion industry that has failed to innovate for too long, and we are just getting started. About Synthesis We do Human Centred Data Science. It’s a way of reimaging open data sources from a human perspective. It prioritises behaviour and context to unravel why people do what they do, at scale.  By blending data science with human and market intelligence, we help our clients spot early signals of change and predict implications for business. Diverse by design. Synthesis is a team of digital researchers, gaming designers, data forecasters, network scientists, ethnographers, and engineers.  Cultural and category experts train our models – ensuring they detect measures that matter most – whilst data scientists uncover patterns the eye cannot see. Building bespoke, comprehensive datasets where none exist. We work with open data - search, ratings, social, and sales.  By layering many signals, we build robust and relevant data-driven stories around brands, businesses, and consumer behaviour. Asia first, global applied. Our products must work in Asia first - the hardest test markets.  We continue to make significant investments in language and capabilities across Asian-specific platforms.  Now applied in Europe, LatAm, and the USA.

title: Associate Professor (Practice) in Quantitative Finance
topic_label: singapore management university, singapore management, management university
description: The Nanyang Business School at Nanyang Technological University invites applications for a faculty position at the Associate Professor (Practice) level in the Division of Banking and Finance. We are seeking an experienced industry professional with a strong background in financial engineering, financial risk analytics, or related fields, who is passionate about bridging academic learning with real-world practice. About NTU: Young and research-focused, Nanyang Technological University (NTU) is ranked No. 12 globally according to the 2026 QS World University Rankings published in June 2025. The campus spans approximately 500 acres and is frequently listed among the Top 15 Most Beautiful in the World. For more information, visit www.ntu.edu.sg. About NBS: As a premier business school in a leading technological university, Nanyang Business School (NBS) strives for world-class innovation, research, and business education. Located in Singapore, the heart of East-West culture and business, NBS strives to develop leaders who can innovate for the future, transform organizations with cultural agility, and build sustainable enterprises across Asia and beyond. NBS is AACSB- and EQUIS-accredited and is currently ranked No. 22 globally in the 2025 Financial Times (FT) Global MBA ranking. This makes it the top-ranked MBA programme in Singapore and No. 3 in Asia. We have been consistently ranked among the top 40 business schools in the FT Global rankings. About the Division: The Division of Banking and Finance (BF) is committed to research excellence. Our faculty’s research is consistently featured in top finance and actuarial/insurance journals. Based on publications in the top five actuarial science/insurance journals, BF is consistently ranked Top 5 among business schools worldwide. The undergraduate programme currently offers two specialisations, Actuarial Science (ACS) and Risk Analytics (RA). The ACS programme is the only programme in Singapore accredited by the Institute and Faculty of Actuaries and recognized by the Society of Actuaries as a Center of Actuarial Excellence (CAE). We are also in the process of launching a new Quantitative Finance track within this programme. The RA programme covers the Financial Risk Manager (FRM) exam curriculum and enhances students’ analytical skills for financial risk management. The Insurance Risk & Finance Research Centre (IRFRC), which was established in 2011, sponsors and directs primary research on insurance and insurance-related risk research in Asia Pacific. Please visit our websites for more information: IRFRC and Banking & Finance Division. Qualifications: A Master’s degree or preferably a PhD in Quantitative Finance, Financial Engineering, Actuarial Science, or a related field. A minimum of ten years of industry experience in quantitative finance, financial engineering, investment banking, risk management, asset management, fintech, or related sectors. Proven ability and/or strong passion for teaching and mentoring students in a university setting. Strong network within the finance and risk industry that can be leveraged for curriculum development, student placement, and university-industry collaboration. Key Responsibilities: Successful candidates will be expected to: Contribute to the development, design, and teaching of a range of courses, including financial risk management, financial engineering, actuarial science, and other finance-related courses, at both undergraduate and postgraduate levels. Bring professional industry insights to enhance the relevance and application of the curriculum. Lead or support the continuous improvement and innovation of academic programmes in Quantitative Finance, Actuarial Science, and Risk Analytics. Leverage strong professional networks to support student career development and job placement efforts. Additionally, candidates must demonstrate service and scholarship through, but not limited to, good-quality publications, book chapters, written cases, pedagogical research, impactful creative works, or patents. Key Benefits: NBS offers an internationally competitive salary commensurate with the candidate’s qualifications and experience, as well as funding support for research and conference travel. The University will also provide subsidized on-campus housing for eligible international faculty, whereby residents have easy access to modern sports, F&B, childcare, and healthcare facilities. Faculty members also enjoy a low-tax environment, with an average tax rate of approximately 10% on the first US$100,000 of income. Application: Review of applications and shortlisting decisions will be made on an ongoing basis until the position is filled. Applicants are invited to submit their applications (cover letter, CV, statements on research, teaching and outreach, and citation report if available) through the NTU career portal: https://ntu.wd3.myworkdayjobs.com/Careers/job/Gaia/Associate-Professor--Practice--in-Quantitative-FInance_R00021716 For enquiries, please write to wjzhu@ntu.edu.sg

description: Position Overview We are seeking an experienced DevOps Engineer to design, build, and maintain our GitLab CI/CD infrastructure. This role will support hybrid deployment models across on-premise and AWS cloud environments, ensuring seamless automation, security, and compliance throughout the software delivery lifecycle. Key Responsibilities • Design, build, and maintain GitLab CI/CD pipelines for application build, test, and deployment • Support hybrid deployment models, including on-premise application servers and AWS environments (DEV, SIT, UAT, PROD) • Manage and operate GitLab Runners (both self-hosted on-premise and cloud-based) • Automate deployment workflows, approval processes, and rollback mechanisms • Integrate CI/CD pipelines with security and quality gates (SAST, dependency scanning, code quality checks) • Collaborate with application teams to onboard new services into the CI/CD framework • Troubleshoot pipeline failures and deployment issues across on-premise and cloud environments • Ensure CI/CD practices comply with organizational security, audit, and governance requirements . Maintain comprehensive CI/CD documentation, runbooks, and operational procedures Required Skills & Experience 1. GitLab CI/CD Expertise a. Strong experience with pipeline design using .gitlab-ci.yml b. Hands-on experience managing GitLab Runners (self-hosted and shared) c. Knowledge of branching strategies, release management, and environment promotion workflows 2. AWS Cloud Experience d. Proven experience deploying to AWS services (EC2, ECS, and related services) e. Understanding of IAM roles and least-privilege access principles for CI/CD f. Familiarity with VPC, security groups, and load balancers 3. Deployment Automation g. Experience with automated deployments to both on-premise application servers and cloud targets h. Proficiency in environment-specific configuration management Good To Have: 1. Infrastructure as Code a. Experience with Terraform or CloudFormation for AWS resource provisioning 2. Security & Compliance b. Knowledge of DevSecOps practices, vulnerability scanning, and secrets management 3. Scripting & Tooling c. Proficiency in Bash, PowerShell, or Python for automation and operational tasks

title: Cloud Operations Lead
topic_label: cloud engineer, devops engineer, cloud engineering
description: We are representing our client in the global technology and engineering space to look for an experienced Cloud Operations Lead. The Cloud Operations Lead is responsible for leading a team of 6 to 10 engineers, including System Administrators, Endpoint Administrators, and Cloud SysOps Engineers. This role combines technical leadership and hands-on contribution, requiring the ability to guide the team through best practices, processes, and methodologies while actively participating in daily operations. The successful candidate will bring expert-level AWS knowledge and a strong understanding of ITIL operational processes, with a proven track record of mentoring junior engineers and leading by example. You will be accountable for operational excellence across cloud infrastructure and applications, while ensuring customer Service Level Agreements (SLAs) are consistently met. Responsibilities Serve as the primary point of contact for customers on operational issues, ensuring timely and effective resolution. Lead, coach, and mentor a team of engineers, fostering a culture of operational excellence and continuous improvement. Assign, delegate, and manage team workloads to ensure tasks are distributed efficiently and effectively. Oversee operational activities including change management, incident management, problem management, and vulnerability management. Manage team responsibilities related to security operations, vulnerability remediation, and patch management, ensuring systems remain secure and up to date. Proactively handle daily events, tasks, incidents, and problems, minimizing operational impact. Lead and actively participate in discussions with Cloud Service Providers, OEMs, and principals, staying informed of emerging technologies and industry trends. Requirements Minimum 5 years of experience working in an enterprise environment. Strong knowledge of IT Service Management (ITSM) frameworks, particularly ITIL. Familiarity with IT security and compliance standards. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively across teams and stakeholders. Strong technical expertise in one or more of the following areas: System Administration, Networking, Cybersecurity, Business Continuity, Microsoft Active Directory & IAM, End User Computing Familiarity with enterprise-class tools and platforms such as Tenable, CyberArk, NetBackup, Splunk, Palo Alto, Symantec Endpoint Protection, or similar solutions.

title: Business Analyst cum Business Support Administrator
topic_label: data engineer, data engineers, data analyst
best_module: CE5808 – Digital Design and Construction (BIM and VDC)
description:
Job Purpose The Business Analyst cum Business Support
Administrator plays a dual role in business analytics and operational
support , enabling data-driven decision-making while ensuring smooth
administrative and business processes. This role focuses on transforming financial and
operational data into meaningful insights, dashboards, and automation
solutions using tools such as Power BI, Tableau, and Python , while
also providing structured business and administrative support to management and
cross-functional teams. Key Responsibilities Business
Analytics & Finance Support Consolidate and analyze regional financial, operational, and commission data to support management reporting and business decisions. Design, develop, and maintain interactive dashboards and reports using Power BI and Tableau to track revenue, costs, commissions, and performance KPIs. Apply Python scripting to automate data extraction, transformation, validation, and recurring reporting processes. Support month-end closing activities by preparing
     analysis packs, reconciliations, and variance explanations in line with
     corporate reporting standards. Partner with business stakeholders to translate operational and financial requirements into data models, reports, and insights . Perform cost allocation, revenue tracking, trend analysis, and scenario analysis to support planning and performance improvement. Support audits, compliance reviews, and process optimization initiatives through data validation and documentation. Undertake ad-hoc analytics, reporting, and business support projects as required. Business Support & Administration Act as a Personal Assistant to the VP/GM , providing proactive and confidential
executive support. Manage complex calendars, meeting schedules, and priorities, ensuring effective time, management for senior stakeholders. Coordinate travel arrangements, including flights, accommodation, visas, and itineraries for regional and overseas business travel. Prepare and format management presentations, reports, and briefing materials, including data-backed slides and summaries. Organize and support management meetings, business reviews, and regional calls, including agenda preparation, minutes, and follow-up on action items. Serve as a key point of coordination between management and internal/external stakeholders, ensuring timely communication and issue resolution. Maintain organized and secure records, correspondence, and documentation, with strong attention to confidentiality and version control. Support expense claims, purchase requests, and vendor coordination for management-related activities. Assist with selected HR coordination tasks (e.g. onboarding logistics, leave tracking, documentation) when required. Provide ad-hoc executive and business support as needed to ensure smooth day-to-day operations. Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) Data Accuracy & Integrity: ≥99% accuracy in dashboards, reports, and automated outputs. Timeliness of Reporting: All recurring reports and dashboards delivered within agreed timelines. Analytics Adoption: Positive feedback and active usage of dashboards by management and business stakeholders. Process Efficiency: Reduction in manual reporting effort through automation and standardized reporting. Compliance & Governance: Full adherence to internal controls, audit requirements, and Singapore regulatory standards. Stakeholder Satisfaction: Strong internal feedback on quality of insights responsiveness, and business support. Requirements Diploma or Degree in Finance, Accounting, Business Analytics, Data Analytics, or a related discipline . Minimum 2–3 years of relevant experience in finance analytics, business analysis, or reporting roles, preferably in an MNC or regional environment. Strong understanding of financial statements, management reporting, and business performance metrics . Hands-on experience with Power BI and/or Tableau for dashboard development and data visualization. Working knowledge of Python for data analysis, automation, or reporting workflows. Advanced Excel skills (Power Query, PivotTables, formulas); experience with enterprise reporting tools (e.g IBM Cognos) is an advantage. Strong analytical mindset with the ability to translate data into clear business insights. Well-organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple priorities under tight timelines. Preferred Attributes Curious, improvement-driven mindset with an interest in automation and digitalization. Ability to handle confidential financial and business information with discretion. Strong stakeholder management and communication skills. Comfortable operating in a hybrid role spanning analytics, finance support, and administration. Adaptable and proactive in a fast-paced, regional business environment. Employer
Branding & Benefits Data-Driven Culture: Be part of a team that values insights, analytics, and continuous improvement. Career Development: Exposure to business analytics, finance, and regional operations with growth opportunities. Competitive Rewards: Attractive salary, annual bonus, and comprehensive benefits including medical coverage. Work-Life Balance: Flexible work arrangements and a supportive, collaborative culture. Regional & Global Exposure: Work closely with cross-functional teams across multiple regions
